reviews.review_description: Even in elite mode, half of my towers were setting around and doing nothing. Hope they add a sand box mode and a next wave button

reviews.review_title: When do we get what we paid for ?
reviews.review_description: I bought this in the sale and got a demo it looks a great game but how long do we have to wait for the mix up to be sorted after all it only takes seconds to take our money !            Edit game now sorted and now rating it 5 stars! A fabulous exciting game with endless,variations so looking forward to months if not years of furious gameplay!

developer_response.body: We know the Oculus Store team fixed the issue on the back end. They are now going through the list of users that were not given the correct entitlements and should be correcting it ASAP. We're sorry it is taking so long!

reviews.review_description: Great game.

developer_response.body:
Hi everyone,

It appears that the Oculus store had a mixup for the special that is running during the American Thanksgiving weekend and unfortunately you didn't get everything you were supposed to get when you purchased the game.  Because of this the game thinks it is a demo when it shouldn't.  Please DON'T pay anything more.  Oculus has been notified and we expect them to automatically upgrade your product to the full version without you having to spend any more.

reviews.review_description: After having purchased Defense Grid 2 several months ago, there is absolutely no problem with replay ability with this one. So many missions divided by chapters in a storied narrative, and that’s just one option in how to experience this game. Each tower weapon can be not only upgraded  during gameplay but also tweaked in the “load out” menu for enhanced abilities. The game gives the player much flexibility in developing specific weapons with custom variations with which to  execute different defense strategies. There is a learning curve in understanding what weapons, enhancements, and tower placement positions work best against each of the many different types of aliens who are attempting to steal power cores. Also difficulty levels of play can be set anywhere from beginner to elite. The game does well at progressing from the player being able to understand and manipulate a few different weapons to being able to master a vast array of weapons and enhancements. There are so many different ways to play this game, one will always want to jump in again and again to try different settings. For me this is the ultimate tower defense game. I hope it will also eventually be made available in a 6 dof version for the Quest. I have throughly enjoyed many hours of play with this game... great graphics and just plain addictive fun!
Great defense game.  Excellent graphics and the smoothest gameplay.

Fun, lotsa options.  Well done game - many hours of fun with different diffulcty levels

4 stars because resolution is average at best and changing point of view would be very nice sometimes
Bought this because I love the PC games only to find out you can't play this without an internet connection. I wouldn't recommend this version do to this DRM

reviews.review_title: This is my favorite game on my Oculus
reviews.review_description: The story mode is nice and long. I can go back now and play the levels with different options. I haven't been able to find another tower defense game this addictive.

I own both DG and DG2 on traditional platforms. When I saw DG 2 in the Go store, I wondered what the point would be of playing this in a VR headset. In a moment of weakness I picked it up on sale. Just as I was surprised at how much I enjoyed watching movies on my Go, I've been having a great time playing DG2 in it. DG2 is probably now my most played game on the Go. Despite the PC version having much more detailed graphics, I find being in the headset much more engaging. The Go controller works great in this one. The game feels like it was made for the Go rather than a port. If you enjoy playing tower defense games, you'll love it. If you've never tried this style of game, this one might get you hooked.

reviews.review_title: I'm in love with this game
reviews.review_description: After some initial problems were fixed (buying the game and getting the demo version), I have to say this is my favorite game on the Go. In fact I've played it daily, and it's all I've played for the last week. You should give it a shot

reviews.review_description: I have a galaxy S7. I purchased it. Downloaded it and the install failed. Did this 3 times and still not working...
I love this game

Very fun and addictive game, but to the DEV it would be awesome if the user could select a tower and control it from the inside. Let the user see from the tower and control the firing. Just a thought.
Best game I've played on the go so far

reviews.review_title: More tower defense games like this
reviews.review_description: Love this game spent many hours playing .. can’t wait fir number 3 to come out. Wish we had more tower defense on Oculus go
Great game play but as others have pointed out it is rather low res. Very much worth the purchase price.

This game is great on Xbox one, so I had to try it on oculus go.  It does have some downfalls with not being able to change viewpoints, or fast forward in this version.  However the immersion is great and vr version has made me start playing through it again.
Worth it
This is my favorite game on the oculus go, wish there were more like it

reviews.review_title: Very good game, just one problem
reviews.review_description:
I like the game very much, but i noticed to play the missions past mission 3 i need to be connected to the internet to be able to play them. When i am offline and try to start the missions the system tells me to try again later.
I hope this will get fixed, this will make it 5 stars for me...

PLEASE ALLOW US TO PLAY THE MISSIONS 4+ OFFLINE... PLEASE...

developer_response.body: As of right now, you will need an internet connection to play the later levels.  We have updated the store description to reflect this information as well.
